entry.title: New: RES26-138 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
AUTHORIZING THE MAYOR TO EXECUTE THE AMENDMENT OF RESTATED MEMORANDUM OF AGREEMENT BETWEEN THE CITY AND COUNTY OF HONOLULU AND THE STATE OF HAWAIʻI, DEPARTMENT OF HAWAIIAN HOME LANDS, FOR THE VARONA VILLAGE AND ‘EWA DRUM PROPERTY EXCHANGE, AND APPROVING THE REVISED EQUALIZATION PAYMENT.

Latest action: Adopted.

View on the council site
